titleStmt.title: SII 19.27: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 27. (A.R. No. 136 of 1926.) TIRUVIḶAKKUḌI, MAYURAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE MAṆAVĀḶĒŚVARA, TEMPLE.

summary.p: The details of date correspond to A.D. 969, April 12 in the reign of Uttama-Chōḷa. The inscription is built in at the right end. It records the remission of taxes on some plots of land belonging to the temple at Tiruvēḻvikkuḍi by purchase, by the assembly of Veḍēlviḍugudēvi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam a brahmadēya in Kuṟukkai-nāḍu on the northern bank of the river, for a lump-sum of 50 īḻakkāśu received by them from a member of the Karikāla-Chōḷa-teriñja-Kaikkōḷar regiment. This body was evidently named after Āditya II.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatu vaṭa
karaik kuṟukkaiñāṭṭu brahmadeyam veṭelviṭukuteviccaturvetimaṅ
kalattu peruṅkuṟiperumakkaḷom Ivvāṭṭai meṣanāyaṟṟu nāyaṟṟukkiḻamai
peṟṟa tiruvoṇattiṉāṉṟu tiruveḻvikkuṭi śrīkoyilile peruṅkuṟi kūṭiiruntu paṇitta
ḻuttu tiruveḻvikuṭi dvaṇḍeśvarapperumāḷ tirunāmattāl vilaikoṇṭa nilam
karumāṇikkavāykkāliṉ tenpakkattu kavaṉ kovinta nārāṇa
ttaṉpakkal vilaikoṇṭa nilam Āṟumākkāṇiyum Itiṉ melaippakkattu Itiṉoṭum Aṭaiya
paṉūruṭaiyāṉ koṉ vempaṭikaḷpakkal vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya nilam Araikkālum catina n=taṉ
ttu kūvaṉṉūr nāraṇakramavittanpakkal vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya nila mākāṇiyum caṇḍeśva- rap
perumāḷ tirunāmattāl vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya pattu mācceykkum kiḻpāṟke
[llai madhya] sdharkaḷ kuḷattukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai peruvaḻikku vaṭakkum mel
kāṇikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai
karumāṇikkavāykkālukku teṟkum Āka Ivvicaitta peru nāṉkellaiyilum Akappa
ttuc ceyyālum tarattāl vanta nilam Āṟu mākkāṇi Araikkāṇi nilamum peruvaḻikku
Irācūrt tāmotirapaṭṭanpakkal caṇḍeśvarapperumāḷ vilaikoṇṭa nilattu
pāṟkellai sabhaippotuvukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai kāvirimaṅkalattār
kku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai tirumañcuṇakkuṟaiyāṉa nilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai
ḻikku teṟkum Ivvicainta perunāṉkellaiyilum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam tarattāl va
m Iccuṭṭappaṭṭa nilam Iṟaiyiliyākka vitiṉukkuk karikālacoḻatteriñak kaikko
ṉa Araiyaṉpakkal Īḻakkācu Aimpatu Aimpatu kācu koṇṭu Iṉṉilam cantirāti
yili ceytukuṭuttom viṭelviṭukutevi[ ccaturvetimaṅkalattu] sabhaiyo
peruṅkuṟi Iruntu paṇikka Eḻutiṉeṉ Ivvūrk kiṭakkai madhyasthaṉ Irāmaṉ I
tiya brahmapriyaneṉ Emperumāṉaṭiyāraṭiyeṉ tiruveḷvikkuṭi tiruveviḷkkuṭi śrīkaraṇattu
ppiccaneṉa nāṉ kalluvicca śrīkaraṇapperuviḷākattu nel melvāram tiruccuṟṟumLines 24—27 are engraved over an erasure. Ends of lines are built in.
yum gopuramum nicati nālāḷukku mukkuṟuṇi nellu ḷukku Aṭṭavum māṭaiyārkaḷu cceyyil pokam
ru viḻāppuṟam ponta varici kuṟuṇiyum kuṟavaṟu ceyyakkaṭavarākac ceyta
Iddhanmam śrīkaraṇappaṉmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 19.27 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
